CustomField.description: For use with Parking Ticket Holders on Weekend View CMT
CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(Parking_Lot__c), "AERO", "Aero", "AL", "Alumni", "AVE", "Ave",
"BAND", "Band", "BK", "Bookstore", "U", "Bulla",
"B", "Burke", "BD", "Burke/Dorr", "BN", "Burke North",
"BS", "Burke South", "CN", "Cartier North", "CS", "Cartier South",
"LTR", "DB+ Offer Letter", "D", "Dorr", "LTRY", "DY Offer Letter",
"ECK", "Eck", "GREN", "Green Field", "GUG", "Gug",
"IP", "Innovation Park", "IPG", "Innovation Park Grass", "I", "IUSB Medical Lot",
"IS", "Ivy", "J", "Joyce", "JH", "Joyce Handicap",
"JONO", "Joyce North", "JOSO", "Joyce South", "LIBR", "Library",
"MULT", "Multiple Passes", "N", "North Lots", "OF", "Official",
"RESA", "Reserved A", "RV", "RV", "RVS", "RVS",
"SRV", "RV Special", "SCH", "Sacred Heart", "LTRF", "Sorin Blue Offer Letter",
"LTRS", "Sorin Trad. Offer Letter", "STAD", "Stadium", "SH", "Stadium Handicap",
"SR", "Stadium Reserved", "YR", "Stayer", "YRGA", "Stayer - GA",
"W", "White Field", "WN", "White North", "WS", "White South",
"Other" )
CustomField.label: Parking Lot Label
